name: Apple Streusel Coffee Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons firm butter or margarine, melted
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a 9-inch round pan.
2. Mix all ingredients except streusel topping in a large bowl until moistened.
3. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and sprinkle with streusel topping.
4. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for about 20-25 minutes, or until a wooden toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
5. Serve warm.
